## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:install`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior, standards, release, or workflow changed
- [ ] `COUNCIL.md` or equivalent handoff evidence updated for meaningful multi-agent work
- [ ] Research citation policy followed when promoting public repo patterns

## Security And Public Package Check

- [ ] No secrets, private downstream data, or copied third-party source
- [ ] Public package files remain neutral and reusable
- [ ] Auth, RLS, dependency, external-call, or release-risk changes were reviewed
